task: I found a backpack at school that doesn’t seem to belong to anyone in my class. What should I do first so I handle it the right way?

turns.agent_response:
First, **don’t open it or dig through it**.  

The best first step is to **turn it in to a teacher, the office, or another school staff member right away** so they can handle it safely and try to find the owner.

If you want, I can also help you figure out **what to say when you hand it in**.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that sounds right. I’d take it to the office or a teacher and not look inside. That seems fair.
